hook: Your 10,000 hours. AI learned it in a weekend.
caption:
Your 10,000 hours. AI learned it in a weekend.

That might sting. It should. Most of us built careers around being useful, productive, and reliable. Then watched machines outperform all three at a fraction of the cost. The question that follows is the only one worth asking: what do you give the world that efficiency cannot measure?

Oliver Burkeman wrote productivity advice for 13 years. In 2021, he wrote about mortality instead. He stopped optimizing and started witnessing. New York Times bestseller. The world was starving for it.

Three questions worth your week: what do you notice, what do you grieve, what would you do for free? Their overlap is your purpose. Save this one.
